title: Trigger (starships)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Trigger}}
'''''Trigger''''' was a group of [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ''Trigger 3'' and ''Trigger 7'' were guarding a secret Imperial research outpost, which was trying to duplicate the [[Shield X]] that was used in [[Operation Ram's Head]], when the facility was then attacked by an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], [[A-wing]], [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] and [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]], the last of which was piloted by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]. Both corvettes were destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
